# 🌐 Browser (117)

The browser is the new API surface, and these repos teach machines to drive it. Point an agent at any website and watch it click, scrape, and fill forms like a human who never gets tired.

[↑ Back to index](../README.md)

## Automation

Script clicks, navigation, and form-filling that run unattended at scale

<details>
<summary>Show 28 repos</summary>

- [microsoft/playwright](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright) — ⭐ 89,385 · `TypeScript` · Framework — Playwright is a powerful framework for web testing and automation, allowing users to control and test Chromium, Firefox, and WebKit browsers with a single API. While primarily for testing, it's also widely utilized for web scraping tasks.
- [ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp](https://github.com/ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp) — ⭐ 38,546 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — This project adapts Chrome DevTools to enable coding agents to debug and interact with browser environments, integrating browser functionalities and debugging tools using technologies like Puppeteer and the MCP.
- [vercel-labs/agent-browser](https://github.com/vercel-labs/agent-browser) — ⭐ 34,014 · `Rust` · CLI Tool — A command-line interface (CLI) tool for browser automation specifically designed for AI agents. It allows agents to perform browser operations like opening pages, executing tasks, and retrieving results via a command-line interface.
- [microsoft/playwright-mcp](https://github.com/microsoft/playwright-mcp) — ⭐ 32,330 · `TypeScript` · MCP Server — This is an MCP server implementation that integrates Playwright, enabling LLMs to perform browser automation, scraping, and page inspection tasks.
- [lightpanda-io/browser](https://github.com/lightpanda-io/browser) — ⭐ 30,459 · `Zig` · Application — Lightpanda is a headless browser written in Zig, specifically engineered for AI and automation tasks, offering exceptional speed and low memory usage compared to traditional browsers, making it ideal for large-scale web scraping, browser agents, and automated testing.
- [Skyvern-AI/skyvern](https://github.com/Skyvern-AI/skyvern) — ⭐ 21,737 · `Python` · Library — Skyvern automates browser-based workflows and tasks using AI, leveraging computer vision and tools like Playwright or Selenium to interact with web pages.
- [web-infra-dev/midscene](https://github.com/web-infra-dev/midscene) — ⭐ 13,178 · `TypeScript` · AI Agent — This repository offers an AI-powered, vision-driven tool for automating user interfaces across various platforms, including browsers, desktop applications, and mobile devices. It enables AI agents to interact with UIs programmatically for tasks like testing and general computer operation.
- [h4ckf0r0day/obscura](https://github.com/h4ckf0r0day/obscura) — ⭐ 11,483 · `Rust` · Library — Obscura is a headless browser designed specifically for AI agents and web scraping tasks. It provides the underlying browser automation capabilities needed for these applications.
- [pixel-agents-hq/pixel-agents](https://github.com/pixel-agents-hq/pixel-agents) — ⭐ 7,699 · `TypeScript` · AI Agent — Given the name "pixel-agents" and the minimal description "Pixel office," this project likely provides or enables agents that interact with graphical user interfaces at a pixel level. It appears to be an application or framework designed to automate tasks within a virtual "office" environment or across various applications by visually interpreting and manipulating screen elements.
- [lackeyjb/playwright-skill](https://github.com/lackeyjb/playwright-skill) — ⭐ 2,584 · `JavaScript` · Skill Pack — This repository provides a Claude Code skill that enables the Claude AI model to autonomously perform browser automation tasks using Playwright. It allows Claude to write and execute custom automation scripts for testing, validation, and general web interaction.
- [qiutongxue/oba-live-tool](https://github.com/qiutongxue/oba-live-tool) — ⭐ 1,353 · `TypeScript` · Application — This is an open-source automation assistant for live e-commerce, designed to streamline operations across various Chinese live streaming and e-commerce platforms like Douyin, Kuaishou, and Xiaohongshu. It provides features such as multi-account management, automated messaging, product explanation pop-ups, and AI-powered smart replies for real-time audience interaction.
- [ywnd1144/Gopay\_plus\_automatic](https://github.com/ywnd1144/Gopay_plus_automatic) — ⭐ 993 · `Python` · CLI Tool — A Python script that automates the entire process of subscribing to ChatGPT Plus, handling various payment gateways like Stripe and GoPay, including OTP and PIN input, primarily for bulk account creation.
- [bug0inc/passmark](https://github.com/bug0inc/passmark) — ⭐ 992 · `TypeScript` · Library — This is an open-source Playwright library designed for AI-driven browser regression testing. It enables natural language execution of browser steps, incorporating intelligent caching, auto-healing, and multi-model verification for robust end-to-end testing.
- [opentabs-dev/opentabs](https://github.com/opentabs-dev/opentabs) — ⭐ 661 · `TypeScript` · MCP Server — OpenTabs is a browser automation tool that transforms web applications into APIs, enabling AI agents to interact with them programmatically rather than just through traditional button clicks.
- [angiejones/mcp-selenium](https://github.com/angiejones/mcp-selenium) — ⭐ 401 · `JavaScript` · Library — This repository provides an MCP (Master Control Program) implementation that leverages Selenium WebDriver to facilitate robust browser automation capabilities for AI agents.
- [Tencent/BrowserSkill](https://github.com/Tencent/BrowserSkill) — ⭐ 398 · `Rust` · Application — BrowserSkill is a local bridge tool consisting of a CLI and a browser extension, enabling AI agents to control a user's real, logged-in browser without interrupting their primary work. It facilitates browser automation, reuses existing login sessions, and allows for user intervention on challenges like CAPTCHAs.
- [loc567/loc567](https://github.com/loc567/loc567) — ⭐ 255 · `C` · Self-hosted Service — A free and open-source web-based tool for simulating iOS device location, usable directly from Safari without jailbreaking or connecting to a computer. It bypasses location detection in apps like DingTalk and WeChat Work by leveraging the browser's geolocation API.
- [blitzbrowser/blitzbrowser](https://github.com/blitzbrowser/blitzbrowser) — ⭐ 254 · `Svelte` · Self-hosted Service — This project enables users to deploy and manage fleets of headful browsers within Docker containers, useful for browser automation, web scraping, and testing.
- [mvanhorn/agentcookie](https://github.com/mvanhorn/agentcookie) — ⭐ 228 · `Go` · Application — Agentcookie is a macOS application that keeps browser sessions (including authentication and cookies) in sync between a user's primary browsing Mac and another Mac dedicated to running AI agents. It ensures agent runtimes like OpenClaw and Hermes are continuously authenticated, operating peer-to-peer over Tailscale.
- [JonBunator/Enterr](https://github.com/JonBunator/Enterr) — ⭐ 227 · `Python` · Application — Enterr is a Python tool that automates website logins to prevent user accounts from being deleted due to prolonged inactivity.
- [sleepinginsummer/agent-browser-cli](https://github.com/sleepinginsummer/agent-browser-cli) — ⭐ 220 · `Rust` · CLI Tool — This is a Rust-based command-line interface (CLI) tool designed to allow AI agents to control and interact with a real Chrome browser. It enables actions like tab scanning, JavaScript execution, cookie management, CDP control, and taking screenshots, facilitating frequent browser interactions for agents.
- [Ktovoz/Skiritai](https://github.com/Ktovoz/Skiritai) — ⭐ 203 · `Python` · Framework — Skiritai is an AI-powered browser automation testing framework for web applications. It uses AI to intelligently explore test paths and generate replayable scripts, significantly accelerating test execution by skipping AI inference on subsequent runs.
- [runablehq/mini-browser](https://github.com/runablehq/mini-browser) — ⭐ 118 · `TypeScript` · CLI Tool — Mini-Browser is an agent-first browser CLI, providing a command-line interface for automated browser interactions, likely for use with AI agents.
- [kunchenguid/chrome-devtools-axi](https://github.com/kunchenguid/chrome-devtools-axi) — ⭐ 100 · `TypeScript` · Library — This library provides an ergonomic interface for AI agents to automate browser interactions, enabling tasks like page loading, DOM inspection, and data fetching.
- [fitchmultz/pi-agent-browser-native](https://github.com/fitchmultz/pi-agent-browser-native) — ⭐ 85 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides a 'pi' extension that integrates the 'agent-browser' tool, enabling native browser automation capabilities. It allows developers to programmatically control web browsers for various tasks.
- [achiya-automation/safari-mcp](https://github.com/achiya-automation/safari-mcp) — ⭐ 74 · `JavaScript` · MCP Server — This repository provides native Safari browser automation for AI agents using AppleScript. It offers 80 tools, runs silently in the background, and serves as an efficient alternative to Chrome DevTools MCP, particularly on Apple Silicon.
- [browser-use/terminal](https://github.com/browser-use/terminal) — ⭐ 64 · `Rust` · CLI Tool — This project offers a terminal user interface (TUI) designed for automating and interacting with web browsers. It allows users to control browser actions and operations directly from a command-line interface.
- [hamr0/barebrowse](https://github.com/hamr0/barebrowse) — ⭐ 38 · `JavaScript` · Framework — A tool that enables AI agents to interact with a real browser, taking a URL as input and returning a pruned snapshot. It serves as a lightweight alternative to Playwright, Selenium, and Puppeteer, designed for efficiency with zero dependencies and minimal token usage for agents.

</details>

## Scraping

Pull structured data from messy pages with LLMs that survive layout changes

<details>
<summary>Show 21 repos</summary>

- [firecrawl/firecrawl](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl) — ⭐ 122,576 · `TypeScript` · Library — Firecrawl is a tool designed to search, scrape, and clean web data, transforming it into structured formats like Markdown for efficient consumption by AI agents.
- [D4Vinci/Scrapling](https://github.com/D4Vinci/Scrapling) — ⭐ 48,551 · `Python` · Framework — Scrapling is an adaptive web scraping framework designed for comprehensive data extraction, capable of handling tasks from single requests to full-scale web crawls. It features intelligence to adapt to website layout updates, ensuring robust data collection.
- [apify/crawlee](https://github.com/apify/crawlee) — ⭐ 23,375 · `TypeScript` · Library — Crawlee is a robust Node.js library for web scraping and browser automation, enabling the creation of reliable crawlers. It's designed to extract diverse data from websites for use with AI, LLMs, and RAG applications, supporting both headful and headless modes.
- [wechat-article/wechat-article-exporter](https://github.com/wechat-article/wechat-article-exporter) — ⭐ 9,175 · `TypeScript` · Application — This is an online tool designed for bulk downloading articles from WeChat Official Accounts, including associated readership and comment data. It supports various file formats and offers both an online interface and options for self-hosting via Docker or Cloudflare.
- [alirezamika/autoscraper](https://github.com/alirezamika/autoscraper) — ⭐ 7,160 · `Python` · Library — Autoscraper is a smart, automatic, and lightweight web scraper for Python that automates the extraction of data from websites. It learns from sample data to efficiently collect information.
- [mishushakov/llm-scraper](https://github.com/mishushakov/llm-scraper) — ⭐ 6,462 · `TypeScript` · Library — This repository offers an LLM-powered web scraper designed to transform any webpage into structured data. It integrates with browser automation tools like Playwright and Puppeteer and supports various large language models, including GPT, Gemini, and Sonnet, for intelligent data extraction.
- [firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server](https://github.com/firecrawl/firecrawl-mcp-server) — ⭐ 6,271 · `JavaScript` · MCP Server — This is the official Firecrawl MCP Server, providing powerful web scraping and search capabilities for various LLM clients like Cursor and Claude.
- [joeyism/linkedin\_scraper](https://github.com/joeyism/linkedin_scraper) — ⭐ 4,071 · `Python` · Library — This Python library is designed to scrape LinkedIn for various user data points, including profiles, company information, and job listings.
- [brightdata/brightdata-mcp](https://github.com/brightdata/brightdata-mcp) — ⭐ 2,378 · `JavaScript` · MCP Server — This is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server designed to enable LLMs to access and interact with the live public web for data collection and scraping, while effectively bypassing anti-bot detection mechanisms.
- [AhmadIbrahiim/Website-downloader](https://github.com/AhmadIbrahiim/Website-downloader) — ⭐ 2,166 · `HTML` · CLI Tool — This Node.js CLI tool downloads the complete source code of any website, including all its assets like JavaScript, stylesheets, and images. It's designed for saving web pages for offline access or detailed analysis.
- [apify/agent-skills](https://github.com/apify/agent-skills) — ⭐ 2,007 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This repository provides a collection of Apify Agent Skills, specifically adding 25,000 web scraping "actors" that can be utilized by AI agents. It extends the capabilities of agents, enabling them to perform advanced web data extraction tasks.
- [enetx/surf](https://github.com/enetx/surf) — ⭐ 1,686 · `Go` · Library — SURF is an advanced Go HTTP client that provides Chrome/Firefox browser impersonation, HTTP/3 with QUIC fingerprinting, and JA3/JA4 TLS emulation to bypass anti-bot detection for web automation and scraping tasks.
- [browser-act/skills](https://github.com/browser-act/skills) — ⭐ 1,398 · `Python` · Skill Pack — This repository provides a CLI tool that empowers AI agents to perform complex web browsing, scraping, and structured data extraction tasks, including handling logins and CAPTCHAs, by controlling a real browser.
- [0xMassi/webclaw](https://github.com/0xMassi/webclaw) — ⭐ 1,328 · `Rust` · MCP Server — A fast, local-first tool for extracting web content and structured data specifically for LLMs. It functions as a web scraper and crawler, providing its capabilities via a CLI, REST API, or as an MCP server, built in Rust.
- [ScrapeGraphAI/scrapecraft](https://github.com/ScrapeGraphAI/scrapecraft) — ⭐ 620 · `Python` · Application — Scrapecraft is an AI-powered web scraping editor that allows users to build, test, and deploy automated web scrapers using natural language and a visual workflow builder. It simplifies data extraction by leveraging ScrapeGraphAI and LangGraph.
- [ysm-dev/cpdown](https://github.com/ysm-dev/cpdown) — ⭐ 538 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — cpdown is a browser extension that enables users to copy webpage content or YouTube subtitles as clean Markdown. It automatically removes irrelevant elements and displays token count, making the extracted text suitable for AI processing or note-taking.
- [yusukebe/ax](https://github.com/yusukebe/ax) — ⭐ 435 · `TypeScript` · CLI Tool — A command-line tool designed for AI agents to efficiently fetch web content, understand its structure, and extract structured data. It streamlines common AI tasks of web scraping into a single, token-efficient command, serving as an "AI-era curl."
- [firecrawl/cli](https://github.com/firecrawl/cli) — ⭐ 398 · `TypeScript` · CLI Tool — This is a CLI tool and an agent skill for Firecrawl, designed to integrate web scraping, search, and browsing capabilities into AI agents.
- [Madi-S/Lead-Generation](https://github.com/Madi-S/Lead-Generation) — ⭐ 271 · `Python` · CLI Tool — This Python script empowers users with no programming background to generate sales leads on a mass scale. It automates the parsing of business, website, and contact information from sources like Google Maps and Yelp into a CSV file.
- [AeternaLabsHQ/pullmd](https://github.com/AeternaLabsHQ/pullmd) — ⭐ 146 · `JavaScript` · Self-hosted Service — This self-hosted service converts arbitrary web page content into clean Markdown format, designed for both human readability and ingestion by AI agents. It intelligently extracts main content, handles JavaScript-rendered pages using a headless browser, and provides web, REST, and MCP interfaces for integration.
- [us/crw](https://github.com/us/crw) — ⭐ 113 · `Rust` · Self-hosted Service — A fast and lightweight web scraper, crawler, and search API written in Rust. It offers a Firecrawl-compatible API for data extraction and serves as an MCP server for AI agents, featuring superior performance and low resource consumption for self-hosting.

</details>

## Extension

AI superpowers injected straight into Chrome and Firefox tabs

- [hangwin/mcp-chrome](https://github.com/hangwin/mcp-chrome) — ⭐ 11,380 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — This Chrome extension functions as a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server, allowing AI assistants like Claude to interact with and control the browser. It enables advanced browser automation, content analysis, and semantic search.
- [bergside/design-md-chrome](https://github.com/bergside/design-md-chrome) — ⭐ 1,724 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — This Chrome extension extracts design styles from websites to generate DESIGN.md files and create design 'skills' for AI systems, based on the TypeUI framework. It streamlines the process of documenting and digitizing design systems for AI-powered development.
- [she-llac/claude-counter](https://github.com/she-llac/claude-counter) — ⭐ 1,412 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — A minimal browser extension that displays exact token counts, cache timers, and usage bars directly on claude.ai, providing more precise usage data than the default interface.
- [kairi003/Get-cookies.txt-LOCALLY](https://github.com/kairi003/Get-cookies.txt-LOCALLY) — ⭐ 953 · `JavaScript` · Library — This tool exports browser cookies into a local 'cookies.txt' file without sending any data externally. It's designed for users who need to utilize their browser's cookies with command-line tools like curl and wget.
- [abundantbeing/hermes-browser-extension](https://github.com/abundantbeing/hermes-browser-extension) — ⭐ 834 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — This is a browser extension providing a native side panel to connect web context directly to a local Hermes Agent runtime. It allows the Hermes Agent to interact with and utilize information from the user's browser environment.
- [jatinkrmalik/LLMFeeder](https://github.com/jatinkrmalik/LLMFeeder) — ⭐ 403 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — This browser extension converts web pages into clean Markdown format. It's designed to easily copy web content to the clipboard for use as context with any large language model.
- [zhu1090093659/deepseek-pp](https://github.com/zhu1090093659/deepseek-pp) — ⭐ 197 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — This is a Chrome extension that enhances the DeepSeek web interface by injecting native-like tool calling, Model Context Protocol (MCP) tools, long-term memory, skills, system prompt presets, and automation capabilities. It aims to empower the DeepSeek LLM with advanced agentic features directly in the browser.
- [blendi-remade/earth-cinema](https://github.com/blendi-remade/earth-cinema) — ⭐ 86 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — A Chrome extension that transforms Google Earth views into cinematic shots, utilizing fal.ai for processing. It allows users to generate fully controllable scenes based on real-world locations.
- [ryohgicc/ShareCraft](https://github.com/ryohgicc/ShareCraft) — ⭐ 22 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — ShareCraft is a browser extension that leverages an LLM API key to instantly convert any webpage into share-ready recommendation copy. It generates content in various styles with one click, suitable for sharing on platforms like WeChat or Slack.
- [joeseesun/qiaomu-tab](https://github.com/joeseesun/qiaomu-tab) — ⭐ 13 · `JavaScript` · Plugin/Extension — A browser extension that provides a calm, local-first new tab dashboard for Chrome.

## Web Agent

Give it a goal, it figures out the clicks across multiple sites on its own

<details>
<summary>Show 35 repos</summary>

- [browser-use/browser-use](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-use) — ⭐ 92,288 · `Python` · Library — This tool provides a real Chrome browser environment, allowing AI agents to interact with and automate tasks on websites. It aims to make online interactions more accessible and automatable for AI agents.
- [browserbase/stagehand](https://github.com/browserbase/stagehand) — ⭐ 22,490 · `TypeScript` · Library — Stagehand is an SDK for building and operating AI agents that automate browser tasks. It enables users to control browsers with natural language, integrate code, and extract structured data from web pages, complete with visualization and debugging.
- [Panniantong/Agent-Reach](https://github.com/Panniantong/Agent-Reach) — ⭐ 21,302 · `Python` · CLI Tool — A CLI tool that provides web browsing and search capabilities, enabling AI agents to access and process information from various internet platforms like Twitter, Reddit, and YouTube without incurring API fees.
- [alibaba/page-agent](https://github.com/alibaba/page-agent) — ⭐ 18,470 · `TypeScript` · AI Agent — This is a JavaScript in-page GUI agent designed to control web interfaces using natural language commands. It enables intelligent automation and interaction with web applications.
- [browser-use/browser-harness](https://github.com/browser-use/browser-harness) — ⭐ 13,274 · `Python` · Agent Framework — Browser Harness is a self-healing framework designed to enable large language models (LLMs) to perform and complete various tasks autonomously across the web.
- [nanobrowser/nanobrowser](https://github.com/nanobrowser/nanobrowser) — ⭐ 12,877 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — This open-source Chrome extension enables AI-powered web automation and multi-agent workflows using a user's own LLM API key. It functions as a privacy-focused alternative to OpenAI Operator for automating browser tasks.
- [Usagi-org/ai-goofish-monitor](https://github.com/Usagi-org/ai-goofish-monitor) — ⭐ 12,048 · `Python` · Application — This AI-powered monitoring and intelligent analysis system uses Playwright to continuously track products on Xianyu (Goofish), an online marketplace. It features a backend management UI and uses AI for real-time and scheduled monitoring to help users find desired products, acting as a "bargain hunting radar."
- [epiral/bb-browser](https://github.com/epiral/bb-browser) — ⭐ 5,144 · `TypeScript` · MCP Server — A CLI and MCP server that allows AI agents to control a Chrome browser using your existing login state. It enables AI agents to interact with websites directly through the browser interface, effectively turning any website into an API without requiring explicit API keys or repeated logins.
- [magnitudedev/browser-agent](https://github.com/magnitudedev/browser-agent) — ⭐ 4,040 · `TypeScript` · AI Agent — An open-source, vision-first browser agent designed for automating web tasks using natural language.
- [browserbase/skills](https://github.com/browserbase/skills) — ⭐ 2,743 · `JavaScript` · Library — This repository provides an SDK that equips Claude AI agents with advanced web browsing capabilities, enabling features like cookie synchronization, bot-aware browsing, and UI testing to interact with web environments effectively and securely.
- [tinyfish-io/tinyfish-cookbook](https://github.com/tinyfish-io/tinyfish-cookbook) — ⭐ 1,912 · `TypeScript` · Tutorial/Course — This repository offers a collection of sample applications and recipes built for the TinyFish web agent. It serves as an open-source resource for users to learn and create their own web automation and agentic AI solutions.
- [hyperbrowserai/hyperbrowser-app-examples](https://github.com/hyperbrowserai/hyperbrowser-app-examples) — ⭐ 1,565 · `TypeScript` · Boilerplate/Template — This repository contains fully functional example web applications that are powered by the Hyperbrowser platform. It serves as a collection of ready-to-use templates or demonstrations for building applications with Hyperbrowser.
- [theredsix/cerebellum](https://github.com/theredsix/cerebellum) — ⭐ 860 · `Python` · AI Agent — Cerebellum is an AI-driven browser automation system designed to intelligently navigate web pages and perform user-defined goals. It leverages AI planning to interact with web content, making it suitable for complex automated web tasks.
- [GoogleChrome/modern-web-guidance](https://github.com/GoogleChrome/modern-web-guidance) — ⭐ 710 · Agent Framework — Official Chrome guidance defining AI Agent Skills by organizing web platform features into expert-verified use cases. It aims to enable AI agents to interact with web content, supporting offline operation and compatibility with various AI tools.
- [unbrowse-ai/unbrowse](https://github.com/unbrowse-ai/unbrowse) — ⭐ 661 · `Shell` · Agent Framework — Unbrowse is an API-native browser SDK for AI agents that auto-discovers APIs from browser traffic. It generates on-the-fly skills, enabling agents to directly call web APIs for faster and more cost-effective local operations.
- [browser-use/desktop](https://github.com/browser-use/desktop) — ⭐ 380 · `TypeScript` · Application — This desktop application enables AI agents to interact with and access websites, serving as an interface for agents to perform tasks within a browser environment.
- [browser-use/bux](https://github.com/browser-use/bux) — ⭐ 351 · `Python` · AI Agent — A self-hosted, persistent browser automation agent that leverages Claude Code for 24/7 web task execution. It allows deployment on personal servers and offers features like human-in-the-loop intervention for complex scenarios.
- [tavily-ai/skills](https://github.com/tavily-ai/skills) — ⭐ 308 · `Python` · Library — This Python library provides specialized skills for AI agents, enabling them to perform web searches, crawl websites, and conduct research by interacting with online content. It equips agents with capabilities to gather and process information from the web.
- [CursorTouch/Web-Use](https://github.com/CursorTouch/Web-Use) — ⭐ 264 · `Python` · AI Agent — Web-Use is an autonomous browser agent, powered by CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol), designed to automate web interactions. It integrates multiple LLMs, vision capabilities, and a semantic tree for advanced web navigation and task execution.
- [hyperbrowserai/examples](https://github.com/hyperbrowserai/examples) — ⭐ 196 · `Jupyter Notebook` · Skill Pack — This repository provides examples and reusable 'skills' for the Hyperbrowser API, a tool designed for web scraping and automation that likely functions as a web agent.
- [robbyczgw-cla/hermes-web-search-plus](https://github.com/robbyczgw-cla/hermes-web-search-plus) — ⭐ 145 · `Python` · Plugin/Extension — This is a plugin for the Hermes Agent that provides multi-provider web search and data extraction capabilities. It includes intelligent routing, quality reports, and a research mode for enhanced information gathering.
- [LakshmanTurlapati/FSB](https://github.com/LakshmanTurlapati/FSB) — ⭐ 105 · `JavaScript` · AI Agent — This is an intelligent, open-source assistant that automates browser tasks, leveraging multiple AI models and designed for agents to operate in real, logged-in browser environments.
- [amaancoderx/skillui](https://github.com/amaancoderx/skillui) — ⭐ 93 · `TypeScript` · CLI Tool — This tool reverse-engineers websites into \`.skill\` files, which are used to define specific functionalities or interactions for Claude. It enables Claude to understand and interact with web content through these generated skill definitions.
- [better-world-ai/x-cli](https://github.com/better-world-ai/x-cli) — ⭐ 89 · `Go` · Agent Framework — This repository provides examples for x-cli, an agent-driven system that allows users to generate CLI tools for browser automation by giving natural language instructions, leveraging a Chrome browser extension without needing APIs or tokens.
- [web-arena-x/webarena-infinity](https://github.com/web-arena-x/webarena-infinity) — ⭐ 52 · `Python` · Application — Web-Arena-Infinity is an approach and tool for automatically generating realistic browser environments and verifiable tasks, often used for training or evaluating web-based AI agents, especially from product manuals.
- [invariantlabs-ai/playwright-computer-use](https://github.com/invariantlabs-ai/playwright-computer-use) — ⭐ 47 · `Python` · AI Agent — This repository provides a Python library that enables an AI model, specifically Claude, to programmatically control and interact with a local web browser, facilitating AI-driven web automation.
- [son-of-ole/infinite-edge-agent](https://github.com/son-of-ole/infinite-edge-agent) — ⭐ 42 · `TypeScript` · AI Agent — An AI agent designed to operate within a local browser environment. It allows users to leverage AI capabilities for browser-based tasks while maintaining local control and avoiding external regulatory constraints.
- [microsoft/webgym](https://github.com/microsoft/webgym) — ⭐ 39 · `Python` · Agent Framework — WebGym is a Python project providing the AsyncWebRL and WebGym frameworks, designed for training web agent models. It leverages asynchronous reinforcement learning techniques, such as async GRPO with a decoupled loss, to enhance the performance and throughput of these web agents.
- [sediman-agent/OpenSkynet](https://github.com/sediman-agent/OpenSkynet) — ⭐ 36 · `Python` · AI Agent — An AI-powered browser agent that learns from user actions to automate daily tasks 24/7. It supports cron scheduling, self-healing for UI changes, self-learning to store reusable skills, and persistent memory.
- [UniPat-AI/SaaS-Bench](https://github.com/UniPat-AI/SaaS-Bench) — ⭐ 36 · `Python` · Framework — This repository provides SaaS-Bench, a collection of realistic, locally deployable SaaS workflows designed for evaluating GUI-based AI agents, especially for browser-use tasks.
- [microsoft/Webwright](https://github.com/microsoft/Webwright) — ⭐ 29 · `Python` · Agent Framework — This is a framework for developing web agents that can perform complex, long-horizon tasks in a browser environment. It uses a 'SWE style' approach and is described as a terminal-native web agent framework.
- [BraaMohammed/bricks](https://github.com/BraaMohammed/bricks) — ⭐ 25 · `TypeScript` · Self-hosted Service — Bricks is an open-source, local-first alternative to tools like Clay.com, designed for business intelligence and lead generation. It leverages AI agents, web scraping, and Puppeteer automation to transform raw CSV data into actionable insights, including data enrichment, email finding, and outreach copy generation.
- [OpenWebRL/OpenWebRL](https://github.com/OpenWebRL/OpenWebRL) — ⭐ 22 · `Python` · Framework — OpenWebRL is a Python framework designed for training visual web agents using online multi-turn reinforcement learning directly on live websites. It aims to provide an open and accessible infrastructure for developing and evaluating web automation agents.
- [aiming-lab/WebHarbor](https://github.com/aiming-lab/WebHarbor) — ⭐ 20 · `HTML` · Framework — WebHarbor is an environment for developing and evaluating GUI agents on real websites. It provides reproducible, login-gated web flows with features like sub-second resets and bypasses for CAPTCHAs, designed for Reinforcement Learning.
- [WeiminXiong/Video2GUI](https://github.com/WeiminXiong/Video2GUI) — ⭐ 18 · `JavaScript` · Paper Code — This repository contains the code for Video2GUI, a research project focused on synthesizing large-scale interaction trajectories from videos. This synthesized data is then used for pretraining generalized GUI agents, enabling them to interact with graphical user interfaces.

</details>

## Anti-detect

Stealth fingerprints and proxies that keep bots from getting flagged

- [daijro/camoufox](https://github.com/daijro/camoufox) — ⭐ 8,627 · `C++` · Application — Camoufox is an anti-detection browser based on Firefox, designed to make automated browsing sessions appear more human-like. It helps prevent AI agents and web scrapers from being detected as bots by masking browser fingerprints and other identifying traits.
- [lwthiker/curl-impersonate](https://github.com/lwthiker/curl-impersonate) — ⭐ 6,534 · `Python` · CLI Tool — A specialized build of the curl command-line tool designed to impersonate the TLS and HTTP fingerprints of popular browsers like Chrome and Firefox, primarily used for web scraping, automation, and bypassing anti-bot detection.
- [jo-inc/camofox-browser](https://github.com/jo-inc/camofox-browser) — ⭐ 4,069 · `JavaScript` · Library — A stealth headless browser for AI agents to bypass web protections like Cloudflare and anti-scraping mechanisms, serving as a drop-in replacement for Puppeteer or Playwright for web automation and scraping.
- [Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser](https://github.com/Virtual-Browser/VirtualBrowser) — ⭐ 2,939 · `Vue` · Application — This is a free anti-fingerprint browser designed for privacy, multi-account management, and web scraping. It helps users bypass detection by modifying browser fingerprints and is useful for activities like web3 airdrops.
- [zhom/donutbrowser](https://github.com/zhom/donutbrowser) — ⭐ 2,840 · `Rust` · Application — Donutbrowser is a simple yet powerful anti-detect browser that creates isolated browser profiles with spoofed fingerprints, primarily used for privacy, managing multiple identities, and avoiding detection by websites.
- [apify/fingerprint-suite](https://github.com/apify/fingerprint-suite) — ⭐ 2,151 · `TypeScript` · Library — This is a suite of browser fingerprinting tools developed by Apify, designed to help anonymize web scrapers by generating realistic browser fingerprints.
- [CloakHQ/CloakBrowser](https://github.com/CloakHQ/CloakBrowser) — ⭐ 1,628 · `Python` · Application — CloakBrowser is a stealthy Chromium browser that bypasses bot detection by modifying browser fingerprints, functioning as a drop-in replacement for browser automation tools like Playwright and optimized for web scraping.
- [black-ant/Ant-Browser](https://github.com/black-ant/Ant-Browser) — ⭐ 1,308 · `TypeScript` · Application — This repository provides a fingerprint browser, a specialized web browser that helps users maintain privacy and manage multiple online accounts by preventing website fingerprinting and detection.
- [clawdbrunner/captcha-solver](https://github.com/clawdbrunner/captcha-solver) — ⭐ 90 · `Python` · Library — A CAPTCHA solver designed to bypass over 30 types of CAPTCHAs, utilizing a prevention method via CloakBrowser and integrating with third-party services like 2Captcha and CapSolver as a fallback.

## Other

Session recorders, captcha helpers, and headless browser glue

<details>
<summary>Show 14 repos</summary>

- [m1k1o/neko](https://github.com/m1k1o/neko) — ⭐ 21,115 · `Go` · Self-hosted Service — Neko is a self-hosted virtual browser and desktop environment that runs inside Docker, utilizing WebRTC for streaming. It allows users to remotely control a browser instance.
- [AnmolSaini16/mapcn](https://github.com/AnmolSaini16/mapcn) — ⭐ 9,222 · `TypeScript` · Library — This repository offers beautiful, free, and easy-to-set-up React map components built on MapLibre GL for web applications.
- [zumerlab/snapdom](https://github.com/zumerlab/snapdom) — ⭐ 7,805 · `JavaScript` · Library — Snapdom is a high-performance JavaScript engine designed to capture, modify, and convert browser DOM elements into various image formats such as PNG, SVG, or WebP.
- [pinokiocomputer/pinokio](https://github.com/pinokiocomputer/pinokio) — ⭐ 7,748 · `JavaScript` · Application — Pinokio is an 'AI browser' that provides a simplified way to install, run, and manage various AI models and tools directly on a user's local machine, abstracting away complex setup processes.
- [shiahonb777/web-to-app](https://github.com/shiahonb777/web-to-app) — ⭐ 3,192 · `Kotlin` · Application — This is a native Android application that enables users to convert any website URL into a standalone Android application, effectively wrapping web content in a native app container.
- [corbindavenport/just-the-browser](https://github.com/corbindavenport/just-the-browser) — ⭐ 2,797 · `Shell` · CLI Tool — This repository provides scripts and instructions to remove unwanted features such as AI integrations, telemetry data reporting, sponsored content, and product integrations from popular web browsers like Chrome, Firefox, and Edge. It aims to offer users a cleaner, more private browsing experience by debloating their browsers.
- [the-ora/browser](https://github.com/the-ora/browser) — ⭐ 2,132 · `Swift` · Application — This is a native macOS browser application developed with SwiftUI and WebKit. It focuses on providing a streamlined and less distracting browsing experience.
- [Jakubantalik/transitions.dev](https://github.com/Jakubantalik/transitions.dev) — ⭐ 952 · `HTML` · Boilerplate/Template — This repository provides a collection of essential UI transitions for web applications, aiming to improve product motion and user experience. It's designed to support integration with Claude Code for agent-assisted development.
- [setube/stackprism](https://github.com/setube/stackprism) — ⭐ 658 · `TypeScript` · Plugin/Extension — StackPrism is a browser extension designed to detect the technology stack of websites. It reveals frontend frameworks, backend technologies, CDNs, and more, allowing users to quickly understand the underlying technologies of any web page.
- [nrenner/brouter-web](https://github.com/nrenner/brouter-web) — ⭐ 462 · `JavaScript` · Application — A web-based client for BRouter, an OpenStreetMap-powered routing engine. It enables users to generate and visualize detailed routes through a browser interface.
- [theoden8/webspace\_app](https://github.com/theoden8/webspace_app) — ⭐ 102 · `Dart` · Application — This application allows users to organize web applications and websites into structured mobile webspaces. It leverages webviews to deliver a native-like experience for web content on phones.
- [FujiwaraChoki/mori-browser](https://github.com/FujiwaraChoki/mori-browser) — ⭐ 56 · `Swift` · Application — Mori Browser is a native AI-powered web browser built for macOS. It utilizes SwiftUI/AppKit for its user interface and the Chromium Embedded Framework for its core browsing engine.
- [Tools2U/AI-Website-Audit-CLI](https://github.com/Tools2U/AI-Website-Audit-CLI) — ⭐ 55 · `Python` · CLI Tool — An open-source CLI tool that leverages the OpenAI API to perform comprehensive website audits, evaluating aspects like SEO, UX, accessibility, and content to generate detailed reports.
- [ricocc/rico-bookmark-manager](https://github.com/ricocc/rico-bookmark-manager) — ⭐ 16 · `Python` · CLI Tool — This tool helps users manage their browser bookmarks by exporting them, organizing them into a searchable local navigation site, and offering features like categorization, deduplication, and dead link checking. It can also import bookmarks back into the browser.

</details>
